question: Walking 10,000 steps a day or strength training 3x per week — which is better for general health?

chatgpt.reason: Walking improves cardiovascular health while strength training reduces chronic disease risk and preserves muscle, so combining them provides the most complete health benefits.
chatgpt.raw:
VERDICT: Both together beats either alone
REASON: Walking improves cardiovascular health while strength training better reduces chronic disease risk and preserves muscle, so combining them provides the most complete health benefits.

perplexity.reason: Strength training builds muscle and bone, while walking mainly supports cardiovascular activity.
perplexity.raw: VERDICT: Strength training is better.REASON: Strength training builds muscle and bone, while walking mainly supports cardiovascular activity.

gemini.reason: Combining both activities provides the best overall health outcomes.
gemini.raw: VERDICT: Both combined provide optimal health.

consensus.label: moderate
consensus.summary: ChatGPT and Gemini agree that combining both is optimal, while Perplexity argues strength training alone is superior.
